revision.comment: Bot: one‑shot full reformat/process [[Template:Parent monthly clean-up category/doc]]
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude>
{{Draft categories|
[[Category:templates with draft categories]]
[[Category:Pages without meta categories]]
}}

<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
[[Category:Pages without meta categories]]
}}</noinclude>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
=== Usage === Parameters:
:1: Name of template used to place pages in this category :2: Sortkey for this category in its parent categories :3,4: optional other templates that also place pages in this category
=== See also ===
<includeonly> <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: -->
</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
=== Usage === Add {{tlx|parent monthly clean up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
:1: Name of template used to place pages in this category :2: Sortkey for this category in its parent categories :3,4: optional other templates that also place pages in this category
=== See also ===
<includeonly> <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: -->
</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
=== Usage === Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
:1: Name of template used to place pages in this category :2: Sortkey for this category in its parent categories :3,4: optional other templates that also place pages in this category
=== See also ===
<includeonly> <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] </includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
=== Usage === Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
:1: Name of template used to place pages in this category :2: Sortkey for this category in its parent categories :3,4: optional other templates that also place pages in this category
=== See also ===
<includeonly> <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[ur:سانچہ:Parent monthly clean up category progress]] </includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
=== Usage === Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
:1: Name of template used to place pages in this category :2: Sortkey for this category in its parent categories :3,4: optional other templates that also place pages in this category
=== See also ===
<includeonly> <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]]
[[ur:سانچہ:Parent monthly clean up category progress]] </includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
=== Usage === Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean-up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
:1: Name of template used to place pages in this category :2: Sortkey for this category in its parent categories :3,4: optional other templates that also place pages in this category
=== See also ===
<includeonly> <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]]
[[ur:سانچہ:Parent monthly clean up category progress]] </includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean-up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
:1: Name of template used to place pages in this category :2: Sortkey for this category in its parent categories :3,4: optional other templates that also place pages in this category
== See also == * {{tlx|Monthly clean-up category}}
<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: +info that this template sets [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance categories sorted by month]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean-up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
:1: Name of template used to place pages in this category :2: Sortkey for this category in its parent categories :3,4: optional other templates that also place pages in this category
The template set the [[:Category:Wikipedia maintenance categories sorted by month]].
== See also == * {{tlx|Monthly clean-up category}}
<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]] }}</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean-up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
:1: Name of template used to place pages in this category :2: Sortkey for this category in its parent categories :3,4: optional other templates that also place pages in this category
The template sets the [[:Category:Wikipedia maintenance categories sorted by month]].
== See also == * {{tlx|Monthly clean-up category}}
<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: /* See also */clean up per [[WP:CAT#T]] and [[WP:AWBREQ]] add template:Sandbox other and <includeonly>
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean-up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
:1: Name of template used to place pages in this category :2: Sortkey for this category in its parent categories :3,4: optional other templates that also place pages in this category
The template sets the [[:Category:Wikipedia maintenance categories sorted by month]].
== See also == * {{tlx|Monthly clean-up category}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]] }}</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean-up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
:1: Name of template used to place pages in this category :2: Sortkey for this category in its parent categories :3,4: optional other templates that also place pages in this category :backlog: if set, marks the page with {{tlx|backlog}}
The template sets the [[:Category:Wikipedia maintenance categories sorted by month]].
== See also == * {{tlx|Monthly clean-up category}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]] }}</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean-up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
* 1= Name of template used to place pages in this category * 2= Sortkey for this category in its parent categories * 3,4= optional other templates that also place pages in this category * backlog= if set, marks the page with {{tlx|backlog}} * container= adds container category notice * tracking= adds tracking category notice * polluted= sets polluted category status
The template sets the [[:Category:Wikipedia maintenance categories sorted by month]].
== See also == * {{tlx|Monthly clean-up category}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean-up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
* 1= Name of template used to place pages in this category * 2= Sortkey for this category in its parent categories * 3,4= optional other templates that also place pages in this category * backlog= if set, marks the page with {{tlx|backlog}} * container= adds container category notice * tracking= adds tracking category notice * polluted= sets polluted category status
The template sets the [[:Category:Wikipedia maintenance categories sorted by month]].
== See also == * {{tlx|Monthly clean-up category}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean-up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
* 1= Name of template used to place pages in this category * 2= Sortkey for this category in its parent categories * 3,4= optional other templates that also place pages in this category * backlog= if set, marks the page with {{tlx|backlog}} * container= adds container category notice * tracking= adds tracking category notice * polluted= sets polluted category status
The template sets the [[:Category:Wikipedia maintenance categories sorted by month]].
== See also == * {{tlx|Monthly clean-up category}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean-up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
* 1= Name of template used to place pages in this category * 2= Sortkey for this category in its parent categories * 3,4= optional other templates that also place pages in this category * backlog= if set, marks the page with {{tlx|backlog}} * container= adds container category notice * tracking= adds tracking category notice * polluted= sets polluted category status
The template sets the [[:Category:Wikipedia maintenance categories sorted by month]].
== See also == * {{tlx|Monthly clean-up category}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23525408989|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == Add {{tlx|Parent monthly clean-up category}} to the top of maintenance categories that have monthly dated subcategories.
Parameters:
* 1= Name of template used to place pages in this category * 2= Sortkey for this category in its parent categories * 3,4= optional other templates that also place pages in this category * backlog= if set, marks the page with {{tlx|backlog}} * container= adds container category notice * tracking= adds tracking category notice * polluted= sets polluted category status
The template sets the [[:Category:Wikipedia maintenance categories sorted by month]].
== See also == * {{tlx|Monthly clean-up category}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia maintenance templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
